scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run --workspace=apps/server build && npm run --workspace=apps/web build && npm run --workspace=apps/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace=apps/server typecheck && npm run --workspace=apps/web typecheck && npm run --workspace=apps/desktop typecheck
scripts.lint: npm run --workspace=apps/server lint && npm run --workspace=apps/web lint && npm run --workspace=apps/desktop lint
